SICO Product Spotlight

SICO LIVE enables individual and institutionalinvestors to trade a diverse array of asset classes in real time across regional and international markets from a single account that can be managed through their desktops, laptops, tablets, or mobile devices.

SICO LIVE provides direct access to the following MENA markets:



As one of the most advanced systems of its kind in the region, SICO LIVE features the highest levels of functionality and security. The multi-functional platform offers a range of services including investment account and transaction information, live newsfeeds, real time quotes, price feed subscriptions, and instant access to SICO's independent research reports produced in-house by the bank’s award-winning research department, which empowers clients to make more informed and cost-effective investment decisions.

Furthermore, SICO LIVE allows retail banks to trade on the Bahrain Bourse (BHB) via the “Bahrain Trade” platform, an innovative online trading solution which allows investors to execute transactions safely and easily.

In 2020, SICO additionally launched a global markets brokerage platform, SICO LIVE Global platform, offering clients access to more than 30 global markets, including the US, UK, and Europe, and over 125 stock exchanges across leading developed and emerging markets.

Recently, as part of digitalization initiative, SICO launched an electronic platform for smooth and efficient on-boarding of individual customers eliminating physical interaction and automating the data capture process. It’s an integrated solution with a cloud ID verification engine(ID&V) and eKYC platform of BENEFIT network, to authenticate the identities of clients and validating their information before granting financial services. The on-boarding platform enables clients to self-enroll with a frictionless experience and complete their account opening at ease.


Benefits to Investors

  • Access multiple GCC markets and buy & sell stocks , ETFS , and REITS 
  • Obtain real time quotes from any GCC market
  • Receive the latest financial and market news
  • Manage your cash and settle your orders through one click
  • Instantly review the top gainers and losers, as well as the most active stocks in any market
  • Access SICO's leading independent research reports
  • Create your own investment portfolio and 'watch lists' to track the latest stock movements
  • Stay informed at all times with customized alerts
  • Remain secure with highest security standards
  • Online Boarding
